chapter_title.en: The meaning of openhandedness and its limitation

text: أبي - رحمه الله - قال: حدثنا علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن حماد بن عيسى، عن حريز بن عبد الله، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: السخي الكريم، الذي ينفق ماله في حق.

en.basel-kadem: 2.	My father, may Allah grant him mercy, said: We were told by Ali bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad bin Isa, from Huraiz bin Abdullah, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: The openhandedness is the generous who spends his property in rights.
